benefits_expected: Enhanced user experience with intelligent features
Improved reliability with robust error handling
Better user engagement through analytics and personalization
Data safety with comprehensive backup system
technical_requirements: Webview API extensions for advanced UI
success_criteria: All high-priority features implemented and tested
User engagement increased through smart notifications
Zero data loss with backup/restore system
Comprehensive error handling with <5% failure rate

risks_mitigations.mitigation: Implement efficient sampling and background processing
Make analytics opt-in with clear data usage policies
